goal:
FREEDOM-FIRST BUILD LAB (monitor mode). Sol=executor on openai-codex; Grok=challenger.

You choose the research path. Prior wakes are context, not a forced menu.
North star: discover/stress until YOU would honestly claim sim readiness for later real-account testing (Ken still arms real money). Do not rush.

Prefer one coherent closed loop. High-value progress types:
- new sim realism / class, OR
- time/direction axis scoreboard, OR
- quality falsify with a real promote/reject, OR
- defined-risk DNA that survives non-vacuous after-cost vs quality bar
Avoid thrashing free single-leg-only pop36 if calendar IV term-structure or a defined-risk edge lab is higher leverage.

Hard stops: paper/research only; no live/broker/arm/shadow auto-promote; no capital path without B3+B4 + competitive ml/dd + non-vacuous after-cost.
Close with: progress type, honest L0–L4 readiness (see docs/BUILD_PROGRESS_AND_CONFIDENCE.md if present), ONE next seed.
